Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 57 

CRED_RCVD_RPLCD_DVC_SW 

LABEL: Credit Received Replaced Device 

DESCRIPTION: The switch used to identify whether the provider received a credit from the Manufacturer for a replaced 
medical device. 

SHORT NAME: CRED_RCVD_RPLCD_DVC_SW 

LONG NAME: CRED_RCVD_RPLCD_DVC_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: Y = credit received 
N = no credit received 

COMMENT: If any claim that
